creator: jbo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dimitry,

Thank you for your response. I do think that this "issue" is not related to the port at all. Therefore, I think this can be closed.
Thank you again for your awesome work of maintaining these JetBrains ports. It's really nice to see how quickly upstream updates land in ports!

@Fernando: I won't be able to test this properly until beginning of next week. However, I don't think that there is anything wrong with the port.
Closing this now.
